posts.text: There has been a boom in books exploring consciousness, perhaps because of the questions AI raises about what counts as life. We review one of them https://www.economist.com/culture/2026/03/12/solving-the-mystery-of-consciousness?taid=69b46a70e4ff750001002017&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
This is not getting nearly enough attention:

The 10Y Note yield is now up nearly +35 basis points since the Iran war began on February 28th.

While gas prices are rising, mortgage rates are quickly following.

All while rate cuts in 2026 are being priced-out.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
